span.p: Section 354: Assault or Criminal Force to Outrage Modesty (eff: 1872-01-01)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Intent to outrage modesty or knowledge that act is likely to outrage modesty

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Assault or use of criminal force on any person

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Act outrages the modesty of the person

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Imprisonment up to 5 years; Fine up to $10000.00; Caning up to 6 strokes

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Illustration example1: A grabs B's arm and touches B inappropriately without ...

span.p: Illustration example2: A, in a crowded place, deliberately presses against B ...
